arts.ttl: Romano reveals Lamine Yamal transfer secret
arts.sum: The football transfer news reporter has revealed that Barcelona were among the clubs interested in the promising youngster but pulled out of the running for the young Brazilian when it became apparent just how good Lamine Yamal was going to become. Romano says that the Barcelona teen, who has taken the football world by storm over the course of the last 18 months, emerging as the world’s most valuable teenager according to FootballTransfers’ unique algorithm, has inadvertently sent Estevao Willian to Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: 'World class' player who rejected Arsenal now in talks to join Barcelona on free transfer
“Barcelona signed me to annoy Real Madrid”
arts.sum: Movistar Plus will premiere the documentary series “No tenéis ni p *** idea”* (”You have no f****** idea”) on September 30, offering an in-depth look at the personal and professional life of Luis Enrique during his final season at Paris Saint-Germain. Although the series primarily focuses on Luis Enrique’s final season, it also offers glimpses into his overall career.

arts.ttl: Szczesny nears Barcelona move in surprise comeback
arts.sum: Wojciech Szczesny appears to be on the verge of a sensational return to football, with reports from Spain suggesting he is close to joining Barcelona. The Polish goalkeeper, who recently announced his retirement and received a heartfelt farewell from Juventus fans, is now in advanced talks with the Catalan giants. According to Corriere dello Sport (via IlBianconero), Barcelona, facing a goalkeeping crisis due to Marc-André ter Stegen’s injury, have reportedly offered Szczesny a contract worth €1.5 million. This potential move comes as a surprise, given Szczesny’s emotional retirement just days ago. arts.ttl: Arsenal face Barcelona competition for potential €50million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal may reportedly not be the only club considering the transfer of €50million-rated Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, according to journalist Ekrem Konur. Writing on X, formerly Twitter, Konur explained that Barcelona are now also showing an interest in the Colombia international as they look at possible long-term replacements for veteran front-man Robert Lewandowski. arts.sum: Barcelona look well on their way to recruiting a new goalkeeper to compensate for the absence of Marc-Andre ter Stegen, for what is likely to be the rest of the season. The Polish goalkeeper retired last month, but looks to be keen on a return to the game.
